import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
try:
    import fitz
    doc = fitz.open\(r'C:\\Users\\orsin\\Desktop\\roadmap.pdf'\)
    for i in range\(min\(len\(doc\), 20\)\):
        page = doc[i]
        print\(f'=== PAGE {i+1} ==='\)
        print\(page.get_text\(\)\)
except ImportError:
    print\('PyMuPDF not installed, trying pypdf...'\)
    try:
        from pypdf import PdfReader
        reader = PdfReader\(r'C:\\Users\\orsin\\Desktop\\roadmap.pdf'\)
        for i, page in enumerate\(reader.pages[:20]\):
            print\(f'=== PAGE {i+1} ==='\)
            print\(page.extract_text\(\)\)
    except ImportError:
        print\('NEED_INSTALL'\)
")

import sys

from pypdf import PdfReader
reader = PdfReader\(r'C:\\Users\\orsin\\Desktop\\roadmap.pdf'\)
for i, page in enumerate\(reader.pages[20:], start=21\):
    text = page.extract_text\(\)
    if text and text.strip\(\):
        print\(f'=== PAGE {i} ==='\)
        print\(text\)
